output.final_deliverable:
1. URL: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Main_Page -> Link text/title: Main Page
   Description: The Wikipedia Main Page is the homepage of Wikipedia, offering a portal to featured content, news, and navigational links to the encyclopedia's main sections such as Contents and Current events. (Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Main_Page)

2. URL: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Contents -> Link text/title: Contents
   Description: The Contents page provides an organized overview of Wikipedia's content, with links to portals, featured content, indexes, and topics to help users navigate the encyclopedia. (Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Contents)

3. URL: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Current_events -> Link text/title: Current events
   Description: The Current events portal compiles recent news and significant worldwide developments, curated by editors to summarize ongoing events and provide sources. (Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Current_events)

4. URL: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Random_article -> Link text/title: Random article
   Description: The Random article link takes the user to a randomly selected Wikipedia article, allowing exploration of diverse topics across the encyclopedia. (Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Random_article)

5. URL: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Help:Contents -> Link text/title: Help
   Description: The Help portal provides guidance for new and experienced editors, including how to edit pages, use Wikipedia tools, and follow community policies and guidelines. (Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Help:Contents)

6. URL: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Portal:Current_events -> Link text/title: Portal:Current events
   Description: The Current events portal is a gateway page that organizes news and timelines of ongoing events, with daily summaries and links to related articles and sources. (Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Portal:Current_events)

7. URL: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Portal:Featured_content -> Link text/title: Featured content
   Description: The Featured content portal showcases Wikipedia's highest-quality articles, images, and other media that have been designated as featured or good content by the community. (Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Portal:Featured_content)

8. URL: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Portal:Contents -> Link text/title: Portals
   Description: The Portals page lists thematic entry points into Wikipedia—specialized topic hubs that aggregate articles, news, and resources about particular subjects. (Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Portal:Contents)

9. URL: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Wikipedia:About -> Link text/title: About Wikipedia
   Description: The About Wikipedia page explains Wikipedia’s mission, history, policies, and how the project is organized and maintained by volunteers around the world. (Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Wikipedia:About)

10. URL: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Wikipedia:Contents/Portals -> Link text/title: Wikipedia portals
   Description: The Wikipedia portals index provides a navigable list of subject-specific portals that serve as starting points for exploring related articles and resources. (Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Wikipedia:Contents/Portals)
output.action_summary: Collected 10 links from the Wikipedia Main Page. For each link I provide the full URL, the link text/title as found on the Main Page, and a 1–2 sentence description of that page, with the source URL for each entry.
